title: Synnergy Dev | Marketing and web development
description: Agency and professional profile combining strategy, marketing, and web development for brands that need a coherent digital presence.
heading: A coherent digital foundation to help your brand grow
intro: We build a web presence that is clear, fast, and ready to communicate, convert, and rank.

sections.title: Strategy before noise
sections.body: Structure, content, and design work together to support the value proposition and a stronger SEO foundation.

sections.title: Consistent visual system
sections.body: Reusable components, spacing rules, and shared styles support a unified identity across every page.

sections.title: Ready to scale
sections.body: The architecture now keeps Spanish in /es/, English in /en/, and the root free to resolve the default locale cleanly.
